campaign_promises: Implement an immediate solution to the unhoused crisis through encampment remediation
Connect unhoused individuals to housing, employment, and health services
Increase affordable housing options that keep homeless residents connected to family support
Address unintended consequences of municipal code 85.02 regarding RV parking in industrial areas
Shift from reactive to preventative policing models that reduce incarceration
Expand community-based 911 response pairing social workers with mental health calls
Streamline business licensing and startup processes to reduce barriers
Promote green jobs in vacant industrial buildings
Ensure Van Nuys Corridor Light-Rail and California High Speed Rail do not displace residents
Continue sidewalk repairs and ADA ramp installations
Increase library operating hours and digital access
Restore youth programs modeled on the former LA City Youth Commission
Fund recreational programming and seasonal youth employment
endorsements: Los Angeles League of Conservation Voters
